texto: Humans, we just hop out of things, off things. We splatter ourselves in inappropriate places. Because we have nothing to live for. Because we want to destroy what we can. Because we want to be something we can’t. Because we don’t really believe we can die.
explicacao: Citação de Deb Olin Unferth sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “Humans, we just hop out of things, off things. We splatter ourselves in inappropriate places. Bec…” articula vida, humans, because em registro de vida, com relevância para contextos como vida.
